description_long: This is a roughly hewn, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly white coloration, interspersed with patches of light brown and tan mineral deposits. Its surface is uneven, featuring both jagged and smoother planes, with some areas appearing more translucent and crystalline, likely due to quartz or calcite content. The stone has a blocky, angular form, with one side showing a flatter, more polished face, while the other sides are more rugged and granular. Subtle veining and mottling are visible, especially where the brown mineralization is concentrated, giving the stone a natural, weathered appearance. The edges are not sharply defined, instead presenting a worn, slightly rounded look, suggesting some exposure to the elements. This type of stone is commonly found in urban landscaping, used as a barrier or decorative obstacle in parks, sidewalks, or garden paths.
description: A blocky, irregular white stone with brown mineral patches and a mix of rough and smoother surfaces. Its natural, weathered look makes it suitable as an urban barrier or decorative element.
description_view_0: This view highlights a prominent angular face with a mix of white and brown mineralization, showing a rough, granular texture.
description_view_1: Here, the stone's crystalline structure is more visible, with translucent patches and a pronounced brown streak along one edge.
description_view_2: This side reveals a flatter, lighter surface with minimal brown coloration, appearing smoother and less textured than other views.
description_view_3: The stone appears mostly white and blocky from this angle, with subtle veining and a gently sloping top edge.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier along pathways
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and veining with patches of brown mineralization, no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Moderately weathered with some surface smoothing and minor rounding of edges, indicating exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces but blends naturally with soil, gravel, or planted areas; may be partially surrounded by grass or mulch.
